mapper.select: SELECT categoryId, categoryTopic, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM category ORDER BY categoryTopic ASC, categoryId ASC
SELECT categoryId, categoryTopic, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM category WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY usageCount DESC, categoryTopic ASC
SELECT categoryId, categoryTopic, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM category WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY categoryTopic ASC, categoryId ASC
SELECT categoryId, categoryTopic, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM category WHERE categoryId = #{categoryId}
SELECT categoryId, categoryTopic, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM category WHERE categoryId = #{categoryId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT categoryId, categoryTopic, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM category WHERE categoryTopic = #{categoryTopic} ORDER BY categoryId ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM category WHERE LOWER(TRIM(categoryTopic)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{categoryTopic}))
AND categoryId != #{excludedCategoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category ( categoryTopic, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt ) VALUES ( #{categoryTopic}, #{status}, #{usageCount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE category c SET c.usageCount = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resource r WHERE r.categoryId = c.categoryId ) WHERE c.categoryId = #{categoryId}
